expected_violation.rule: exp MUST be after iat (capability token time consistency: exp < iat is invalid)

note: exp (2026-07-22T00:30:00Z) is before iat (2026-07-22T01:00:00Z), violating business-layer time consistency. JSON Schema format checks only validate RFC3339 well-formedness, so this is a business-layer invariant. policy_bundle_hash is structural; 结构示例，非密码学有效证据.
